function.description: Check that the local Study Anything API is reachable before starting a learning loop. Method: GET /v1/health.
function.name: study_anything_health

function.description: Create a learning session for a local user. Use demo mode only for smoke tests. Method: POST /v1/sessions.
function.name: study_anything_create_session

use_demo_agent.description: True only for local demos and CI smoke tests. Real learning should use the configured user-owned agent.

function.description: Attach source material gathered by the platform agent to the learning session. Method: POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/reading.
function.name: study_anything_add_reading

reference.description: Stable citation, URL, file reference, or platform-local source id.

text.description: Source excerpt. Do not include secrets.

function.description: Advance the Study Anything workflow after a source is attached or after HITL resolution. Method: POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/run.
function.name: study_anything_run

function.description: Generate layered teaching output such as whole-topic overview, glossary, examples, or Obsidian-style notes through user-owned Agent capabilities. Method: POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/teaching-layers.
function.name: study_anything_teaching_layers

layers.description: Teaching layers to generate. Each layer routes to a separate Agent capability default.

function.description: Submit the learner's answer to one or more quiz items and advance mastery evaluation. Method: POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/answers.
function.name: study_anything_answer

answers.description: Map of quiz item id to learner answer.

function.description: Read the compact mastery state for the completed learning loop. Method: GET /v1/sessions/{session_id}/mastery.
function.name: study_anything_mastery

function.description: Return redacted proof that Study Anything Agent providers handled the required learning tasks. Method: GET /v1/sessions/{session_id}/agent-audit.
function.name: study_anything_agent_audit

function.description: Return the redacted eval bridge for Promptfoo, DeepEval, LangChain AgentEvals, and Ragas. Method: GET /v1/sessions/{session_id}/agent-eval/artifact.
function.name: study_anything_agent_eval_artifact
